name: @bamzzstudio/cforge-sdk
description: Umbrella TypeScript SDK for C-forge CFRG token minting, MiniPay stablecoin payments, Celo contract metadata, and wallet helpers.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --prefix packages/addresses && npm run build --prefix packages/abi && npm run build --prefix packages/core && npm run build --prefix packages/wallets && npm run build --prefix packages/react
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck --prefix packages/addresses && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/abi && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/core && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/wallets && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/react
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist packages/*/dist && find packages -name tsconfig.tsbuildinfo -delete
